description_long: This object is a square-shaped gift box with a deep red exterior and a glossy, metallic gold ribbon wrapped around it. The ribbon forms a large, decorative bow on the top, with wide loops and long, curling tails that drape over the sides of the box. The box has a smooth, hard surface with sharp, clean edges and a slightly reflective finish, suggesting it is made from sturdy cardboard or thin plastic. The gold ribbon is highly reflective and appears to be made from a metallic or foil-like material, adding a festive and luxurious touch. The box is likely hollow inside, designed to contain gifts or parcels, and the lid is clearly defined, indicating it can be opened. This type of object is commonly seen in urban environments during holidays or special occasions, placed on doorsteps, in parks, or as part of public displays.
description: A red square gift box with a shiny gold ribbon and large decorative bow, featuring a smooth, reflective surface and a clearly defined lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gold bow and ribbon centered on the top of the red box, with both ribbon tails visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width of the box and the gold ribbon running vertically down the center, with one bow loop and tail extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the box with the gold ribbon and bow loops, and the ribbon tails less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gold ribbon running vertically and the other bow tail extending outward, with the box's depth visible.
